productName: Full Spec - Cadet - Cartridge - 1g - (S) Apple Sundae
description: A sativa vape cartridge filled with Apple Sundae oil — smooth, flavorful vapor in a discreet, no-torch, push-button format that goes wherever you go. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — with notes of pear, apple, and butter, with an upbeat, talkative energy.
